_doc: Declarative inventory of the default (non --include-full) Forge payload. Each entry maps a source path under forge/forge/ to its bundle path (dist/forge-payload/), install destination (bootstrapped project root), and removal owner (uninstall grouping). Authored in FORGE-S32-T02 from build-payload.cjs Pass-2, bootstrap.ts Steps 2-5, and uninstall.ts. FORGE-S32-T03 wires the three consumers to read this file. The owner enum and select shape are provisional pending T03. --include-full superset entries are intentionally out of scope.

entries.note: Curated TOOLS_TO_COPY allowlist (build-payload Pass-2 2a). Forward-checked only — an unlisted tool is a deliberate minimal-payload exclusion, not drift. New runtime-required tools MUST be added here (FORGE-BUG-030/036 MODULE_NOT_FOUND class).
FORGE-BUG-030: build-payload.cjs WRITES this {"type":"commonjs"} scope marker (no source file on disk) so bundled lib/*.js resolve as CommonJS inside "type":"module" host projects.
Curated LIB_ALLOWLIST (build-payload Pass-2 2a). Excludes *.test.cjs. Forward-checked only.
Top-level *.cjs hooks (build-payload Pass-2 2e4). hooks.json and README.md are intentionally not bundled. Installed under .forge/tools/hooks/ and wired into .claude/settings.json.
Hook runtime deps (common.cjs, write-registry.js, ...) — required or every PostToolUse hook fails with MODULE_NOT_FOUND.

Recursive *.schema.json incl. _defs/ (build-payload Pass-2 2e). Bundled to BOTH .schemas/ (tool resolution) and schemas/ (command prose $FORGE_ROOT/schemas/). Installed (incl. _defs/) to .forge/schemas/.
Non-schema JSON consumed by catalog-loader.ts / transition-guard.ts (build-payload Pass-2 2e1b).
Read by check-structure.cjs (__dirname/../schemas/structure-manifest.json). Bundled via the non-dot schemas/ all-JSON mirror.

FSM transition tables (build-payload Pass-2 2e1b). Bundle-only: shipped to dist/forge-payload/.schemas/transitions/ for transition-guard.ts resolution, NOT installed into .forge/schemas/ (the historical install tree never vendored transitions/). FORGE-BUG-044.

Payload-root migrations.json copied into .schemas/ for migration-engine.ts (build-payload Pass-2 2e1). Bundle-only: shipped to dist/forge-payload/.schemas/ for migration-engine resolution, NOT installed into .forge/schemas/. FORGE-BUG-044.
Plugin utility slash-commands (build-payload Pass-2 2e2). Loser on name collision with .base-pack/commands/ during bootstrap Step 4b.
Recursive base-pack tree (build-payload Pass-2 2d). Vendored wholesale to .forge/.base-pack/; subsets re-installed by the two entries below.
Sprint-workflow command shims. Winner on name collision with commands/ (bootstrap Step 4a).
wfl-*.js workflow drivers installed to .claude/workflows/ (bootstrap Step 5).
Init rulebook phase prompts read by run-phases.ts / wfl-init.js (build-payload Pass-2 2e-pre).
Per-domain discovery prompts (build-payload Pass-2 2e-pre). The curated .init/discovery/discover-*.md bundle subset is a separate build-payload target; install uses the full set.
Generation prompts (build-payload Pass-2 2e-pre, full set to init/generation/). The curated .init/generation/generate-kb-doc.md bundle subset is a separate target.
Referenced by vendored commands (rebuild.md reads .forge/init/workflow-gen-plan.json). INIT_ROOT_FILES (build-payload Pass-2 2e-pre).
Personas + skills source-of-truth, recursive (build-payload Pass-2 2a2). build-persona-pack.cjs hashes meta/ for the pack cache key (forge-cli#25 defect A).
Plugin manifest / version source (build-payload Pass-2 2f).
Plugin Claude Code subagents (tomoshibi, store-query-validator). Tracked by integrity.json (build-payload Pass-2 2e3).
Curated SKILLS_TO_COPY (build-payload Pass-2 2i). Each entry is a skill directory (SKILL.md). Forward-checked only.
Plugin-tampering manifest resolved at forge-root by verify-integrity.cjs (build-payload Pass-2 2e0b).
